name: hyperframes-cli
description: HyperFrames CLI dev loop. Use when running npx hyperframes init, add, catalog, capture, lint, check, snapshot, compare, grade-compare, preview, play, render, publish, cloud, feedback, lambda, doctor, browser, info, upgrade, skills, compositions, docs, benchmark, telemetry, transcribe, tts, or remove-background (validate/inspect/layout are deprecated aliases covered by check), or when troubleshooting the HyperFrames build/render environment. Entry point for HeyGen-hosted cloud rendering (`hyperfr
